mechanics.text:
EQUIPMENT
armor = enhanced strength; these can literally rip the armor plates off 'Mech vehicle The Clans have used the standard elemental battlesuit for more than century; nearly every front-line and even many second line unit has been issued the suits. The Inner Sphere powers have been manufacturing their own battle armor designs decade but the Successor States have only enough ser- vice to equip few of their elite regiments and special-forces units_ Power-armor troopers have special systems_ For example , all suits are environmentally sealed, allowing them to function space 0r underwater: heads up display (HUD) with infrared capabilities projects data t0 the trooper'$ screen: Advanced short-range tactica communications systems are built into every suit; while others can be easily fitted with longer-range and even satellite comm systems (though in the latter case_ portable dish would need to be set up). Built-in sensors moni: tor the pilot' condition, activating medipack if circumstances warrant It. Clan power-armor suits are equipped with more advanced medical system as well as mechanism tnat auto matically seals breaches the armor with substance known as HarJel, The suits myomer enhanced strength also provides additional boost melee combat:
Game Rules Piloting battlesuit   i5 not easy task. armored infantry   trooper must possess the skills pilot   the suit (Piloting/Battlesuit) and tne physica strength and stamina needed t0 work it (BOD STR 6 -1 Characters without the appropriate Piloting Skill and/or high enough STR or BOD who are trying to pilot suit will have difticult time of it: Such character will suffer point of Fatigue every turn ne moves faster than walking speed Or fights in melee combat: In addi: tion, if the character uses sprinting evading movement; uses jump jets or fires any kind of support weapon from the suit, he must make BOD Check sufter Grazing Wound from the stress the suit puts on nis body: Battlesuits are custom fitted t0 their pilots, potential problem to characters looking to simply put one on ad run with it Most suits can af course, be readjusted for new pilot: This process can be completed 106 10 minutes, though the assistance unarmored character with tne Piloting/Battlesuit Skill will cut the time required half, Using suit not custom fitted or adjusted inflicts +2 TN Modifier t0 all Action Checks Standard Cian and Inner Sphere battle armor suits have severa universal hardpoints, allowing troopers t0 custom-con" figure their suits with weapons_ Two different classes can be mounted: heavy armor-defeating weapons such missiles and lasers and lighter secondary weapons for anti-infantry use_ Each battlesuit can usually carry one primary and one ondary weapon; though some can carry more -tne text for each suit will specify nov many of each it can carry: Rechargeable power packs are provided for energy weapons_ while mounting points and pouches are available for extra ammunition maga
